title: trachycarpus martianus subsp. khasyana
intro: Trachycarpus martianus subsp. khasyana, also known as the Himalayan fan palm, is a species of palm tree native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its sap, leaves, and seeds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. The sap of the plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as ointments and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
